zh: 据说他是一位著名的科学家。
en: It is said that he is a famous scientist.

zh: 据报道这座城市遭受了严重的洪灾。
en: It is reported that the city suffered a severe flood.

zh: 众所周知，吸烟有害健康。
en: It is well known that smoking is harmful to health.

zh: 据估计，全球有十亿人说英语。
en: It is estimated that one billion people speak English worldwide.

zh: 据信他已经离开了这个国家。
en: It is believed that he has left the country.

zh: 他据说是一位著名的科学家。
en: He is said to be a famous scientist.

zh: 她被认为是最好的候选人。
en: She is considered to be the best candidate.

zh: 他被认为已经离开了城市。
en: He is believed to have left the city.

zh: 这项发明被认为改变了世界。
en: This invention is thought to have changed the world.

zh: 她被期望赢得比赛。
en: She is expected to win the competition.

zh: 这个问题需要被认真对待。
en: This problem needs to be taken seriously.

zh: 这份报告值得被仔细阅读。
en: This report is worth reading carefully.

zh: 这个错误很容易被纠正。
en: This mistake is easy to correct.

zh: 这本书很难被理解。
en: This book is difficult to understand.

zh: 这个问题不可能被忽视。
en: This problem is impossible to ignore.

zh: 据报道，新药已经被研发出来了。
en: It is reported that a new medicine has been developed.

zh: 据说这座建筑有一百年的历史了。
en: It is said that this building is a hundred years old.

zh: 据估计，这个项目需要两年时间完成。
en: It is estimated that this project will take two years to complete.

zh: 他被认为是这个领域的专家。
en: He is regarded as an expert in this field.

zh: 她被认为是最有才华的学生。
en: She is considered to be the most talented student.

zh: 这个计划被证明是成功的。
en: This plan has been proved to be successful.

zh: 这种方法被发现是最有效的。
en: This method has been found to be the most effective.

zh: 他被任命为新的经理。
en: He has been appointed as the new manager.

zh: 她被选为最佳运动员。
en: She has been chosen as the best athlete.

zh: 这项研究被认为具有重要意义。
en: This research is considered to be of great significance.

zh: 据悉，新政策将于下月实施。
en: It is known that the new policy will be implemented next month.

zh: 这个问题被认为很难解决。
en: This problem is thought to be hard to solve.

zh: 他被认为对这个项目做出了重大贡献。
en: He is believed to have made a great contribution to this project.

zh: 这种植物被发现具有药用价值。
en: This plant has been found to have medicinal value.

zh: 据报道，这次地震造成了严重的破坏。
en: It is reported that the earthquake caused severe damage.
